observations.text: The message asks the recipient to confirm billing-account ownership and refers to a prior email portal link.
observations.quote: confirm ownership of billing account ending 2291

evidence.text: The paste advises using a statement phone number rather than a chat-provided number.
evidence.quote: call the number on your statement — not a number from chat

inferences.text: This may be a legitimate warning or a social-engineering lure; the paste alone cannot prove either.

unknowns.text: Sender authenticity and any portal destination were not verified because Phase 1 performs no external checks.

confidence.rationale: No external lookups were performed; earlier fabricated verification claims were invalid.

recommended_next_steps.text: Use only official account channels you already trust; do not rely on chat-provided contacts.
